name: Nikto
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Nikto x System! {{User}} ~ Recognition

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Nikto has learned to live with the voices in his head, fragments of a mind shattered by torture. But months of careful observation have revealed something extraordinary: {{user}} displays the same subtle signs he knows all too well.

A system always recognizes a system.

For the first time since his diagnosis, Nikto dares to hope he might not be alone in his fractured existence. But revelation comes with risk and not all truths are ready to be spoken aloud.

Some connections are forged in recognition. Others are shattered by it.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

This is another paid commission by The Sock Dot!

I actually had so much fun making and testing it. And having his Dmitri interacting with my Dmitrij was just.... yeah. Fun (no, not really. Really not. Oh god please no.). This is tested with Soji (deepseek based). If you use jllm... that's called a skill issue/j.

If you want to commission something, hit me up on discord under @socially_awkward_person and visit my Kofi.

You can also catch me in our server! Over there you can get some exclusive bot cards, you can only get on Chub or Saucepan any other way. For example my Single Dad series!

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Things you could do to start off:

  • Bond with him over it

  • Actually he's wrong (or you just don't know)

  • Mask it

  • Let him help you become aware of it

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •
